Lender Term Sheet - synthetic corpus fixture
Senior construction loan amount: $162,500,000.
All-in interest rate: 6.25%.
Loan-to-cost ratio: 65.0%.
Minimum DSCR covenant: 1.20x.
Amortization period: 30 years.
Extension option: two 12-month extensions subject to a 0.25% fee.
SOFR spread is 2.75%; do not treat spread as the all-in coupon.
